description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by lush, mature trees and a well-maintained lawn. The house features a simple rectangular footprint with a low-pitched, dark gable roof and light-colored exterior siding. The front facade includes a small covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by a flower bed and a paved driveway. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, with additional windows visible on the sides, providing ample natural light. The property is bordered by a short white fence, and the landscaping includes both decorative and shade trees. The overall appearance is inviting and typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light siding, a small front porch, and lush landscaping with mature trees and a flower bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, flower bed, driveway, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, surrounded by trees and a grassy yard, with no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, side windows, and the proximity of trees to the structure.
description_view_3: Angled view from the driveway side, showing the car access, porch, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
